# Mirror current workspace snapshot to GitHub

Current local workspace state needs to be published to the remote repository so GitHub matches the VTT shell fixes, docs updates, and the latest tracked source/content changes.

Scope:
- publish the current repo snapshot
- overwrite the existing remote state with the current local history/content as requested
- keep the work focused on synchronization rather than new product behavior
